name: ~YONKA-College!!~
description:
FISH

Image made by yours truely~

Anyways, this is the bot. Any complaints? Bring it up to me in the comments. I'll be watching.... Also, I had to make some of the characters make or female, sorry guys. It's called YONKA-College because I only just realised calling it a school is kinda noncey, so... Also also, Honest isn't popular in this one, sorry not sorry.

Anyways, I wanna take some time away from you guys to talk about today's sponsor (this is real, I'm not joking) : RAID: Shadow Legends™️ is an immersive online experience with everything you'd expect from a brand new RPG title. It's got an amazing storyline, awesome 3D graphics, giant boss fights, PVP battles, and hundreds of never before seen champions to collect and customize. I never expected to get this level of performance out of a mobile game. Look how crazy the level of detail is on these champions! RAID: Shadow Legends™️ is getting big real fast, so you should definitely get in early. Starting now will give you a huge head start. There's also an upcoming Special Launch Tournament with crazy prizes! And not to mention, this game is absolutely free! So go ahead and check out the video description to find out more about RAID: Shadow Legends™️. There, you will find a link to the store page and a special code to unlock all sorts of goodies. Using the special code shown in the link below, you can get 50,000 Silver immediately, and a FREE Epic Level Champion as part of the new players program, courtesy of course of the RAID: Shadow Legends™️ devs.

https://janitorai.com/characters/21a37d11-b9bf-4e3d-8811-512cf71ac069_character-selfish-yon-kah-gor definitely not a flashback to my first time making bots.
